prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.6 kg; Height 169.9 cm; BMI 20.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 185mg/dL; 9 months ago 174mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.8kg; 9 months ago 57.1kg; 6 months ago 53.9kg; 3 months ago 53.9kg; current 58.6kg), Height (12 months ago 169.9cm; 9 months ago 169.9cm; 6 months ago 169.9cm; 3 months ago 169.9cm; current 169.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 68mg/g; 9 months ago 75mg/g; 6 months ago 111mg/g; 3 months ago 92mg/g; current 109mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 109mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 100mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.91 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
